Initial Value: Coding = NASA MRID Sponsor Organizations#medical-operations "Medical Operations"
overview.purposePurpose/Objectives0..1textInitial Value: string = To screen crew members for H. pylori infection prior to long-duration spaceflight. Positive cases require treatment before flight to prevent gastric ulcer complications.
overview.flight-durationFlight Duration0..1stringInitial Value: string = >= 30 days

Options: 3 options

hpylori-results.eradication-confirmedEradication Confirmed (Post-treatment Test Negative)0..1booleanEnable When: hpylori-results.treatment-completed =

Documentation for this format

Options Sets

Answer options for overview.sponsor

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-mrid-sponsor-cs#medical-operations ("Medical Operations")

Answer options for hpylori-results.test-type

  • Urea Breath Test
  • Stool Antigen Test
  • Serology (IgG)
  • Endoscopy with Biopsy

Answer options for hpylori-results.result

  • http://snomed.info/sct#260385009 ("Negative")
  • http://snomed.info/sct#10828004 ("Positive")
  • http://snomed.info/sct#419984006 ("Equivocal")

Answer options for hpylori-results.treatment-regimen

  • Triple Therapy (PPI + Clarithromycin + Amoxicillin)
  • Quadruple Therapy (PPI + Bismuth + Metronidazole + Tetracycline)
  • Other

Answer options for data-delivery.archive

  • https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-data-archive-cs#mmis ("Medical Mission Information System")
